water.name: Pescadero Creek tributaries and main stem above the Stage Road bridge at Pescadero

authorities.name: California Department of Fish and Wildlife

sources.title: CCR T14 §7.40(b)(74) — Pescadero Creek tributaries and main stem above the Stage Road bridge at Pescadero (Santa Clara and San Mateo Cos.)
sources.quotedText: (74) Pescadero Creek tributaries and main stem above the Stage Road bridge at Pescadero (Santa Clara and San Mateo Cos.). Closed to all fishing all year.

sources.title: 2026 California Freshwater Sport Fishing Regulations (CDFW booklet)
California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

parameters.note: Closed to protect steelhead and coho salmon spawning and rearing habitat in the upper Pescadero Creek watershed (Pescadero Creek County Park / Portola Redwoods State Park), upstream of the Stage Road bridge in the town of Pescadero.

regulations.humanSummary: Pescadero Creek tributaries and the main stem above the Stage Road bridge at Pescadero are closed to all fishing all year.
regulations.verbatimText: Pescadero Creek tributaries and main stem above the Stage Road bridge at Pescadero (Santa Clara and San Mateo Cos.). Closed to all fishing all year.

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license. This water is closed to all fishing all year, so the license requirement is moot here, but is included for statewide-standard completeness.

regulations.humanSummary: California sport fishing license required for anglers 16+
regulations.verbatimText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...
